title: Cuneiform Tablet #0568: Hellenistic Magical
description: A cuneiform tablet from the Hellenistic period — a magical document preserved on clay.
introduction: A cuneiform tablet from the Hellenistic period — a magical document preserved on clay.

translation.text: Cuneiform tablet of the Hellenistic period. Magical document. Inscribed on clay in cuneiform script. The tablet records magical matters typical of Hellenistic period administrative or literary practice.
